name: Atlantis Limousine Inc

name: Go Service Transportation Co
recent_news: No web presence located under this exact name at the Concord Township, OH address; phone (440) 639-9340 does not surface in searches. Likely a very small / informal operator or stale listing.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (3 employees, ~$160K rev). No confirmation it operates school buses. Not a priority tuck-in absent additional intel.

name: Hogan Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Numerous school boards across Cuyahoga and surrounding counties (NE Ohio); 2025-2026 district transportation contract on file (BoardDocs).
recent_news: Signed 2025-2026 student transportation services agreement (board contract document publicly posted). Continues curb-to-curb special-needs service for districts in Cuyahoga and surrounding counties.
fit_notes: Strongest fit of the batch. Family-owned, 55+ year old NE Ohio special-needs / pre-K / school transport contractor (DBA Hogan Transportation; HQ 36475 Reading Ave Willoughby; Wickliffe Euclid Ave likely satellite/older listing). Elaine Hogan as president + multi-decade tenure = clear succession opening. Cuyahoga / Lake County district book complements Summit's NE Ohio footprint. NOTE: distinct from Hogan Truck Leasing / Hogan Transports (St. Louis, 1918) - that is a separate company.

name: Speedway Medical Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: Medicaid / non-emergency medical transport clients in NE Ohio
recent_news: Ohio NEMT operator with Yelp presence in Willoughby Hills; principal Aleksandr Katsman (~45) listed at the company. No school-district contracts or school-bus operations identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Non-emergency medical transportation (Medicaid NEMT), not school-bus / SPED contracted to districts. Outside Summit's student-transportation focus.

name: Western Reserve Limo Svc
